title: collomia debilis f. intergra
intro: Collomia debilis f. intergra, also known as the delicate mountain skypilot, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Collomia debilis f. intergra include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often in combination with other medicinal herbs, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
